raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right end-effector can reach the right side of box_2 without colliding with the cup, and applying light inward pressure will not tip box_2. Stabilization is needed because box_2 is attached_to box_1 and may move when box_1 is lifted.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is laterally constrained by the right end-effector, reducing motion of the attached pair during lifting."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left end-effector has clear access to the left and front-left faces of box_1; box_1 is too large (30 cm) to grasp with the claw, so a friction/palm grasp is used. Ensure the cup in front of box_2 is not in the sweep path of the left arm.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held by the left end-effector and ready to be lifted off the table."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both end-effectors can contact opposite lateral faces of box_1 without colliding with box_2 or the cup; dual-arm support is required due to box size and to counter any load coupling from the attachment to box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is supported by both arms with a stable two-sided grasp, improving lift stability."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The grasp is stable and there is sufficient vertical clearance above box_1; box_2 remains stabilized so the attachment does not drag the pair into the cup.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is lifted off the tabletop and controlled in the air (picked up), with box_2 motion minimized by stabilization."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The right end-effector can reach the right side of box_2 without colliding with the cup, and applying light inward pressure will not tip box_2. Stabilization is needed because box_2 is attached_to box_1 and may move when box_1 is lifted.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is laterally constrained by the right end-effector, reducing motion of the attached pair during lifting.

parsed_json.Precondition: The left end-effector has clear access to the left and front-left faces of box_1; box_1 is too large (30 cm) to grasp with the claw, so a friction/palm grasp is used. Ensure the cup in front of box_2 is not in the sweep path of the left arm.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held by the left end-effector and ready to be lifted off the table.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both end-effectors can contact opposite lateral faces of box_1 without colliding with box_2 or the cup; dual-arm support is required due to box size and to counter any load coupling from the attachment to box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is supported by both arms with a stable two-sided grasp, improving lift stability.

parsed_json.Precondition: The grasp is stable and there is sufficient vertical clearance above box_1; box_2 remains stabilized so the attachment does not drag the pair into the cup.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is lifted off the tabletop and controlled in the air (picked up), with box_2 motion minimized by stabilization.
